issuesFound.title: srUtils.markInvalid missing aria-invalid
issuesFound.explanation: When marking a form field as invalid, the function adds aria-describedby to link the error message but fails to set aria-invalid="true" on the field itself. Screen readers will not announce the field as invalid.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3080 (in markInvalid): Add after `addDescribedBy(field, errorEl);`:
  `setAttr(field, 'aria-invalid', 'true');`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav toggle missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation drawer opens and closes by toggling CSS classes, but the trigger button's aria-expanded attribute is never updated to reflect the state change. Screen readers cannot announce whether the menu is expanded or collapsed.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3304 (in open function): Add after `addClass(_drawer, CONFIG.navigation.openClass || CSS.open);`:
  `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');`
  Line 3320 (in close function): Add after `removeClass(_drawer, CONFIG.navigation.openClass || CSS.open);`:
  `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion toggle missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: FAQ accordion items animate open and closed, but the trigger button's aria-expanded attribute is not updated when the state changes. Screen readers will not announce the expanded or collapsed state to users.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 4180 (in open function): Add after `item.open = true;`:
  `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');`
  Line 4200 (in close function): Add after `item.open = false;`:
  `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: siteSearch combobox missing aria-expanded updates
issuesFound.explanation: The search input acts as a combobox with a suggestion listbox, but aria-expanded is never set on the input to indicate when the listbox is displayed or hidden. Screen readers cannot convey whether suggestions are available.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3550 (in _open function): Add after `_searchState.open = true;`:
  `if (_inputEl) setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'true');`
  Line 3560 (in _close function): Add after `_searchState.open = false;`:
  `if (_inputEl) setAttr(_inputEl, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: pricing missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When the billing period is toggled between monthly and annual, prices update visually but no aria-live announcement informs screen reader users of the price change or the new billing period.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3900 (in setPeriod, after updating plan cards): Add:
  `const periodLabel = BILLING_PERIODS[period].label; liveRegion.announce((STRINGS.pricingPeriodChanged || 'Prices updated to {period} billing').replace('{period}', periodLabel));`

issuesFound.title: productFilter tabs missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: Filter tab buttons function as toggle buttons where one is active at a time, but they lack aria-pressed attributes. Screen readers cannot identify which filter is currently active or that these are toggle buttons.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3750 (in _syncTabAriaStates): Replace `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive);` with:
  `toggleClass(btn, CSS.active, isActive); setAttr(btn, 'aria-pressed', String(isActive));`

issuesFound.title: faqAccordion missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: When FAQ items are expanded or collapsed, the state change is not announced to screen readers via a live region, leaving users unaware that content has been revealed or hidden.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 4180 (in open function): Add after `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');`:
  `if (announceToSR !== false) liveRegion.announce((STRINGS.faqOpened || '{title} expanded').replace('{title}', item.question));`
  Line 4200 (in close function): Add after `setAttr(item.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`:
  `if (announceToSR !== false) liveRegion.announce((STRINGS.faqClosed || '{title} collapsed').replace('{title}', item.question));`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Opening and closing the mobile navigation menu changes the visible state significantly, but no aria-live announcement notifies screen reader users that the menu has opened or closed.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3304 (in open function): Add after `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');`:
  `if (announceToSR !== false) liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navOpen || 'Navigation menu opened');`
  Line 3320 (in close function): Add after `setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`:
  `if (announceToSR !== false) liveRegion.announce(STRINGS.announce.navClosed || 'Navigation menu closed');`

issuesFound.title: srUtils.markValid missing aria-invalid clear
issuesFound.explanation: When clearing the invalid state from a field, the function removes the error description association but does not remove or set to false the aria-invalid attribute, leaving screen readers believing the field is still invalid.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3090 (in markValid): Add at the end of the function (before the closing brace):
  `removeAttr(field, 'aria-invalid');`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav missing focus trap implementation
issuesFound.explanation: The _trap variable is declared but never initialized with createFocusTrap(), and activate/deactivate are never called. When the mobile menu opens, focus is not trapped within the drawer, allowing users to tab behind the modal overlay.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3340 (in init function, after _initialised = true): Add:
  `_trap = createFocusTrap(_drawer, { returnFocus: _trigger });`
  Line 3304 (in open function): Add after `addClass(document.body, CSS.navOpen);`:
  `if (_trap) _trap.activate();`
  Line 3320 (in close function): Add before `emit(_trigger, 'mobilenav:close', ...)`:
  `if (_trap) _trap.deactivate();`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu missing live region announcement
issuesFound.explanation: Dropdown menus open and close without announcing their state to screen readers, leaving users uncertain whether the menu is visible or where focus has moved.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3420 (in _openInstance): Add after `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'true');`:
  `liveRegion.announce('Menu opened');`
  Line 3430 (in _closeInstance): Add after `setAttr(inst.trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`:
  `liveRegion.announce('Menu closed');`

issuesFound.title: mobileNav missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation toggle button does not have aria-expanded initialized to "false" when the page loads, failing to indicate that the menu is initially collapsed.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3340 (in init function, after _initialised = true): Add:
  `if (_trigger) setAttr(_trigger, 'aria-expanded', 'false');`

issuesFound.title: dropdownMenu missing aria-expanded initialization
issuesFound.explanation: When dropdown triggers are registered, aria-expanded is not initialized to "false" on the trigger button, failing to communicate the initial collapsed state to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix:
Line 3400 (in register function, after setAttr(trigger, 'aria-controls', panelId);): Add:

issuesFound.title: mobileNav toggle functions do not update aria-expanded on trigger

issuesFound.title: mobileNav missing focus trap implementation

issuesFound.fix:
Line mobileNav.init(): After `_initialised = true;`, add `_trap = createFocusTrap(_drawer, { returnFocus: _trigger });`
  Line mobileNav.open(): Change `if (_trap && _trap.isActive()) _trap.activate();` to `if (_trap && !_trap.isActive()) _trap.activate();`

This breaks the programmatic association between the label and its corresponding input field, making it impossible for assistive technologies to identify the purpose of the form field.
issuesFound.fix: Line ~780: <label htmlFor={htmlFor} className="form-label">

issuesFound.title: Select component missing aria-invalid mapping
issuesFound.explanation: The Select component receives an invalid prop but does not apply aria-invalid to the select element, preventing screen readers from announcing error states.
issuesFound.fix: Line ~850: <select id={id} aria-invalid={invalid ? "true" : undefined} className={['form-select', invalid ? 'form-select--error' : '', className].filter(Boolean).join(' ')} {...rest}>

issuesFound.title: Checkbox component missing aria-invalid mapping
issuesFound.explanation: The Checkbox component receives an invalid prop but does not apply aria-invalid to the input element, preventing screen readers from announcing error states.
issuesFound.fix: Line ~865: <input id={id} type="checkbox" aria-invalid={invalid ? "true" : undefined} aria-describedby={errorId} className="checkbox-input" {...rest} />

issuesFound.title: NewsletterForm broken aria-describedby reference
issuesFound.explanation: The TextInput has aria-describedby pointing to 'newsletter-email-error', but the FormGroup is passed the error prop (incorrect prop name; should be errorMessage) and no errorId, so the ErrorMessage component is never rendered with that ID. This creates a broken ARIA reference.
issuesFound.fix: Line ~2280: Change error={email.state.touched ? email.state.error : undefined} to errorMessage={email.state.touched ? email.state.error : undefined} and add errorId="newsletter-email-error".

issuesFound.title: ContactForm broken aria-describedby references
issuesFound.explanation: FormGroup usages pass error prop instead of errorMessage and omit errorId, while TextInput/Textarea elements reference error IDs ('contact-name-error', etc.) that don't exist in the DOM.
issuesFound.fix: For each FormGroup at lines ~2380, ~2395, ~2410, ~2425: Change error={...} to errorMessage={...} and add errorId="contact-[field]-error" matching the aria-describedby value on the input.

issuesFound.title: NavDropdown trigger missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The dropdown trigger button controls a menu with aria-controls but lacks aria-expanded to communicate the open/closed state to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: Line ~935: Add aria-expanded={isOpen} to the button element.

issuesFound.title: MobileNav section trigger missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The section trigger button toggles submenu visibility with aria-controls but lacks aria-expanded to communicate the expanded/collapsed state.
issuesFound.fix: Line ~1130: Add aria-expanded={isExpanded} to the button element.

issuesFound.title: FaqItemComponent trigger missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The FAQ trigger button controls a panel with aria-controls but lacks aria-expanded to communicate the disclosure state.
issuesFound.fix: Line ~1960: Add aria-expanded={isOpen} to the button element.

issuesFound.title: SiteHeader mobile nav toggle missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The mobile navigation toggle button has aria-controls but lacks aria-expanded to communicate the menu open/closed state.
issuesFound.fix: Line ~1320: Add aria-expanded={isOpen} to the button element.

issuesFound.title: ThemeToggle IconButton missing accessible name
issuesFound.explanation: The IconButton lacks an aria-label prop, leaving the theme toggle button without an accessible name.
issuesFound.fix: Line ~1190: <IconButton aria-label={LABELS[theme]} onClick={() => setTheme(NEXT[theme])} className="theme-toggle">

issuesFound.title: FilterTabs buttons missing aria-pressed
issuesFound.explanation: The filter toggle buttons indicate active state visually but lack aria-pressed to communicate the pressed state to assistive technologies.
issuesFound.fix: Line ~1635: Add aria-pressed={activeFilter === tab.value} to each button element inside the FilterTabs map.
